title: Create brass cursor [PORT]
description: This is a resourcepack, that changes cursors from Minecraft Cursor/Cursors Extended mod to brass style ones from Create mod.
body:
This is a ported version of resource pack [Create brass cursors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-brass-style-cursors), that changes cursors from [Minecraft Cursor/Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to brass style ones from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod.

REQUIRES [Minecraft Cursor/Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) MOD!
